No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a contribution to eradicating poverty.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives relates to hunger, food security, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives relates to health, well-being, or medical services.

Quality Education.reason: As a required university course, it provides tertiary education (4.3), develops professional media skills for employment (4.4), and fosters sensitivity to social issues (4.7).
evidence: 培養學生在媒體工作所需的即戰力
新聞媒體實作的大補帖課程
培育數位時代的專業素養

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives addresses gender equality or women's empowerment.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives relates to water, sanitation, or hygiene.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives relates to energy access, renewable energy, or efficiency.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course explicitly aims to cultivate '即戰力' (immediate combat power) for media work, directly preparing students for productive employment and decent jobs (Target 8.5).
evidence: 培養學生在媒體工作所需的即戰力
獲得扎實滿血的新聞實戰力

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course teaches digital skills like '製作網頁' (web page production) and '社群媒體推播' (social media promotion), contributing to ICT use and innovation (Target 9.c).
evidence: 培育數位時代的專業素養

Reduced Inequalities.reason: By increasing '對新聞社會議題的敏感度' (sensitivity to social issues), the course trains journalists to report on inequalities, promoting social inclusion (Target 10.2).
evidence: 提高對新聞社會議題的敏感度

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives relates to urban development, housing, or public spaces.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives relates to sustainable consumption, production, or waste management.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives relates to climate change mitigation, adaptation, or awareness.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives relates to marine ecosystems or ocean health.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives relates to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, or land management.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course teaches '採訪技巧與倫理' (interviewing skills and ethics) and '專業倫理' (professional ethics), crucial for public access to information (16.10) and accountable institutions (16.6).
evidence: 提高對新聞社會議題的敏感度
陶鑄敬業精神、專業倫理與全球視野

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course's collaboration with 'PeoPo公民新聞平台' for publishing student work exemplifies a civil society partnership to share knowledge (Target 17.17).
evidence: 公共電視台Peopo公民新聞平台等亦不定時邀請本課程同學作品刊登
